comment.body:
Two very important things i know about and alma said too. Market is not overvalued, p/e is there on paper. Economy doesn't indicate this fast market but big boys want it now to accelerate as much as it can. Thus the admin will do everything to pump it up they have every tools to execute that.

The current April bottom rebound is not diverged from the monthly moving averages as much as many would think. Those 3-4% pullbacks that occured inbetween did a good job. rsi is also not overstretched. This is the result of time correction. Alma has like a 8.7k target into the end of this admin. And it is rational If you don't care about short term noises even if the swing takes a 10% range then don't wait for any pullback to buy. Just buy and hold. Everybody is net long. Literally is everybody. Just these exposures are not augmented confidently
